# nightshift-ai

## How-to guides

How to generate landing-page copy with gtm — Run /gtm:site to produce reviewed, brand-correct landing-page copy with a full SEO layer and the durable site-brief.md handoff — docs/how-to/generate-landing-page-copy.md

## Reference

Changelog — Release notes are generated from commit messages by nx release; this page points to the canonical GitHub Releases and plugin changelogs. — docs/changelog/index.md
